slides.title: Executive Summary
bullets: 18-agent autonomous AI network managing trading, analysis, and operations
Processing 50+ actionable signals/day
Self-healing infrastructure with 99.7% uptime target
Emotional intelligence layer adapting to operator stress in real-time
Projected ROI: 340% Year 1

slides.title: Scalable Architecture
bullets: V7 Agent Skills Router — 18 specialist agents with load balancing
Delegate AI Orchestrator for performance-based task routing
Leitner spaced-repetition error memory (5-level triage)
Visual Mapping Protocol for orphaned/bottleneck detection
Circuit breaker pattern preventing cascade failures

slides.title: Market Intelligence (GeoTalent)
bullets: Skill Gap Analyzer scanning MASTER_INDEX for systemic weaknesses
Market Trends Monitor tracking 2026 AI standards (LLMs, frameworks)
News Bureau Chief filtering global events for actionable signals
Auto-triggered context refresh on high-impact events (score >= 7)
DataValidationEngine blocking decisions on unreliable data

slides.title: Financial Projections
